title: PolicyForge
intent: Policy authoring, versioning, attestation, and enforcement workflows
requirements: authoring module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
versions module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
attestations module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
exceptions module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
mappings module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
enforcement module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
